case_title: JULIE VERONESE VS. FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERONESE, JULIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS $3,402.00 PRINCIPAL, $66.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,468.00, JUDGMENT AGAINST OAKLAND-BASED DEFENDANT ONLY. VERNON-BASED DEFENDANT HAS NOT LIABILITY. THE COURT FINDS THAT INSUFFICIENT CARE WAS EXCERCISED BY FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS. VERNON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERONESE, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-03-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2011 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (12 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF VERONESE, JULIE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS, LLC FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY VERONESE, JULIE FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS, LLC FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,452.00 FILED BY VERONESE, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS, LLC FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2011 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-18-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S HUSBAND JOE VERONESE APPEARS ON HER BEHALF. DEFENDANTS PRESENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS, LLC FLAT RATE MOVING SYSTEMS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF APPEARING. MARIAN PETTEE APPEARED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANTS. CLERK: BERTHA PAREDES. NOT REPORTED (506).
